alert: Workers are processing duplicate jobs and customer notifications are repeated.
root_cause: message queue visibility timeout too low

evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:message_queue: Message queue logs show messages becoming visible again before workers finish.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:message_queue:VISIBILITY_: Message queue config has VISIBILITY_TIMEOUT_MS below job runtime.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:message_queue: Message queue metrics show duplicate delivery while publish errors are normal.

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(message queue visibility timeout too low, increase visibility timeout)
distractors: Database metrics are normal despite duplicate work.
